metadata.name: Candidate Pipeline — Weekly Pooled Digest
metadata.description: Scheduled Zap that runs every Monday at 9am and matches Pooled candidates against newly opened roles from the past 7 days. If any matches are found it sends a digest to the recruitment Slack channel so recruiters can surface candidates who were missed first time around.

config.note: Pulls all pooled candidates. Limited to 50 per run to stay within Zapier's output limits.

output_variables.pooled_candidates: Array of candidate records (name, email, role_type, skills, seniority, submission_date)

steps.label: Fetch Roles Opened in Last 7 Days

config.note: Returns only roles that were opened (or reopened) in the last 7 days to surface fresh opportunities for pooled candidates.

output_variables.new_roles: Array of new open role records

steps.label: Match Pooled Candidates to New Roles — Code by Zapier
Filter — Only Continue if Matches Found
